d.t: Nói về bài tập về nhà

e.p: What is the homework?
e.m: Nói môn học và bài cụ thể.
e.h: Use 'The homework is + N' hoặc 'It is + N'.
e.s: The homework is math exercise two.

e.p: When is the homework due?
e.m: Nói thời gian nộp (ví dụ: today).
e.h: Use 'It is due + time' hoặc 'It is + time'.
e.s: It is due today.

e.p: How many pages do I read?
e.h: Use 'Read + number + pages' hoặc 'You read + number + pages'.
e.s: Read five pages.

e.p: Can I ask a question about the homework?
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: Yes, you can.

e.p: Who checks the homework in class?
e.m: Nói người kiểm bài (ví dụ: teacher).
e.h: Use 'The + N + checks' hoặc 'Teacher checks'.
e.s: The teacher checks the homework.

e.p: When is the assignment due?
e.h: Use 'It is due + time'.
e.s: It is due tonight.

e.p: Is the due date tomorrow?
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is' hoặc 'No, it isn't'.
e.s: No, it isn't.

e.p: Where do I submit the work?
e.m: Nói nơi nộp bài (e.g., in class).
e.h: Use 'Submit + at/in + place' hoặc 'You submit + place'.
e.s: Submit it in class.

e.p: Do I need a cover page?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nêu ngắn gọn nếu cần.
e.h: Use 'Yes, you need' hoặc 'No, you don't'.
e.s: Yes, you need a cover page.

e.p: Who can I ask if I miss the due date?
e.h: Use 'Ask + the + N' hoặc 'Ask + person'.
e.s: Ask the teacher.

e.p: What should I study for the test?
e.m: Nói chủ đề cần học (ví dụ: vocabulary).
e.h: Use 'Study + N' hoặc 'Study + topic'.
e.s: Study the vocabulary and the book pages.

e.p: How long do I study each day?
e.m: Nói thời gian học mỗi ngày (ví dụ: one hour).
e.h: Use 'I study + time' hoặc 'Study + time'.
e.s: I study one hour every day.

e.p: Can I use a dictionary in the test?
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: No, you can't use a dictionary.

e.p: Who studies with you?
e.h: Use 'I study with + person' hoặc 'My friend studies with me'.
e.s: I study with my friend.

e.p: What time is the test on Monday?
e.m: Nói giờ kiểm tra đơn giản (e.g., morning).
e.h: Use 'The test is at + time' hoặc 'It is in the + morning/afternoon'.
e.s: The test is in the morning.

e.p: How do you feel after the exam?
e.h: Use 'I am + adj' (happy/sad).
e.s: I am happy.

e.p: Did you pass the test?
e.m: Trả lời ngắn yes/no với pass/fail.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I did' hoặc 'No, I didn't'.
e.s: Yes, I did.

e.p: What is the result?
e.h: Use 'My result is + adj' hoặc 'It is + adj'.
e.s: My result is good.

e.p: Do you want to try again?
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' hoặc 'No, I don't'.
e.s: Yes, I want to try again.

e.p: Who gives the exam feedback?
e.h: Use 'The teacher gives' hoặc 'Teacher gives'.
e.s: The teacher gives the feedback.

e.p: Can you help me with question three?
e.m: Nói bạn có thể hay không (can/can't).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I can' hoặc 'No, I can't'.
e.s: Yes, I can help you.

e.p: What is the answer to number five?
e.m: Nói câu trả lời ngắn cho câu số 5.
e.h: Use 'The answer is + N' hoặc 'It is + N'.
e.s: The answer is seven.

e.p: Where is the sample paper?
e.m: Nói nơi có tài liệu mẫu (on desk/in class).
e.h: Use 'It is + place' hoặc 'On + place'.
e.s: It is on the teacher's desk.

e.p: Who can explain this topic to me?
e.m: Nói người có thể giải thích (teacher/friend).
e.h: Use 'Ask + the + N' hoặc 'My friend can'.
e.s: The teacher can explain it.

e.p: Do you give extra practice papers?
e.m: Trả lời có/không ngắn và nêu nếu có.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I give' hoặc 'No, I don't'.
e.s: Yes, I give extra practice papers.

e.p: When do you study English?
e.h: Use 'I study + time' hoặc 'I study in the + morning/evening'.
e.s: I study in the evening.

e.p: How often do you review your notes?
e.h: Use 'I review + frequency' hoặc 'Every day'.
e.s: I review my notes every day.

e.p: Can you study with a friend?
e.h: Use 'Yes, I can' hoặc 'No, I can't'.
e.s: Yes, I can study with a friend.

e.p: What do you use to study?
e.h: Use 'I use + N' hoặc 'Use + N'.
e.s: I use a book.

e.p: Who makes your study plan?
e.h: Use 'I make' hoặc 'My teacher makes'.
e.s: I make my study plan.

e.p: What is your grade in math?
e.h: Use 'My grade is + adj' hoặc 'I get + number'.
e.s: My grade is good.

e.p: Do you get full marks?
e.h: Use 'Yes, I do' hoặc 'No, I don't'.
e.s: No, I don't get full marks.

e.p: Who gives your grade report?
e.h: Use 'The teacher gives' hoặc 'Teacher gives'.
e.s: The teacher gives the grade report.

e.p: Can I improve my grade?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nêu cách ngắn (study more).
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can + verb' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: Yes, you can study more.

e.p: Where can I see my grade online?
e.h: Use 'On + place' hoặc 'On the + N'.
e.s: You can see it on the school website.

e.p: Can I have an extension for the assignment?
e.m: Trả lời can/can't ngắn và nêu lý do ngắn (sick).
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't' và 'because + reason'.
e.s: Yes, you can because you are sick.

e.p: How many extra days do I get?
e.h: Use 'You get + number + days' hoặc 'One day'.
e.s: You get one extra day.

e.p: Who approves the extension?
e.h: Use 'The teacher approves' hoặc 'Teacher approves'.
e.s: The teacher approves the extension.

e.p: Do I need a note from home?
e.m: Trả lời có/không ngắn và nêu nếu cần.
e.h: Use 'Yes, you need' hoặc 'No, you don't'.
e.s: Yes, you need a note from home.

e.p: When must I submit after extension?
e.h: Use 'It is due + time' hoặc 'Submit + time'.
e.s: It is due tomorrow.

e.p: Is there a test today?
e.h: Use 'Yes, there is' hoặc 'No, there isn't'.
e.s: Yes, there is a test today.

e.p: What materials do we need?
e.h: Use 'You need + N' hoặc 'Bring + N'.
e.s: You need a pen and a book.

e.p: Can we sit with a friend?
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: No, you can't sit with a friend.

e.p: Who monitors the class test?
e.h: Use 'The teacher monitors' hoặc 'Teacher monitors'.
e.s: The teacher monitors the class test.

e.p: Where is the test paper after the exam?
e.m: Nói nơi giấy kiểm tra (teacher desk).
e.h: Use 'It is + place' hoặc 'On + place'.
e.s: It is on the teacher's desk.

e.p: Do we work in groups?
e.h: Use 'Yes, we do' hoặc 'No, we don't'.
e.s: Yes, we work in groups.

e.p: Who is in your group?
e.h: Use 'My friend + name/role' hoặc 'My friend is + role'.
e.s: My friend helps me in the group.

e.p: What part do you do?
e.h: Use 'I write' hoặc 'I speak' hoặc 'I do + N'.
e.s: I write the report.

e.p: Can we use phones in group work?
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: No, you can't use phones.

e.p: When do you meet for group work?
e.h: Use 'We meet + time' hoặc 'After class'.
e.s: We meet after class.

e.p: I forgot my homework. What do I do?
e.m: Nói hành động ngắn (tell teacher/bring tomorrow).
e.h: Use 'Tell + person' hoặc 'Bring + time'.
e.s: Tell the teacher and bring it tomorrow.

e.p: Can I email the assignment?
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: Yes, you can email the assignment.

e.p: Who lost the paper?
e.h: Use 'I lost it' hoặc 'My friend lost it'.
e.s: I lost the paper.

e.p: Where did you look for it?
e.h: Use 'I looked + place' hoặc 'At + place'.
e.s: I looked at home.

e.p: Do you need a new copy?
e.m: Trả lời có/không ngắn và nêu nếu có.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I need' hoặc 'No, I don't'.
e.s: Yes, I need a new copy.

e.p: What do you bring to the exam?
e.h: Use 'I bring + N' hoặc 'Bring + N'.
e.s: I bring a pen and my ID.

e.p: What time do you arrive?
e.m: Nói giờ đến đơn giản (early/on time).
e.h: Use 'I arrive + time' hoặc 'I arrive early'.
e.s: I arrive early.

e.p: Can you eat before the exam?
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: Yes, you can eat before the exam.

e.p: Who checks your ID at the door?
e.h: Use 'The teacher checks' hoặc 'Staff checks'.
e.s: The staff checks my ID.

e.p: Where is the exam room?
e.h: Use 'It is in + place' hoặc 'In the + N'.
e.s: It is in the main classroom.

d.t: Ôn tập: Nộp bài và điểm

e.p: What is the homework and when is it due?
e.m: Nói môn/bài và thời gian nộp (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'The homework is + N. It is due + time.'
e.s: The homework is science exercise three and it is due tomorrow.

e.p: Who gives the grade and where do you see it?
e.m: Nói người cho điểm và nơi xem điểm (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'The teacher gives + N. You see it on + place.'
e.s: The teacher gives the grade and you see it on the school website.

e.p: Can you ask for an extension and who approves it?
e.m: Trả lời can/can't và nêu người duyệt (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'Yes, you can + reason. The teacher approves.'
e.s: Yes, you can ask for an extension and the teacher approves it.

e.p: What do you do if you forget your homework?
e.h: Use 'Tell + person' hoặc 'Bring + time.'
e.s: Tell the teacher and bring it tomorrow.

e.p: Do you get extra practice and who gives it?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nêu người (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'Yes, + person + gives' hoặc 'No, + person + doesn't'.
e.s: Yes, the teacher gives extra practice.

d.t: Ôn tập: Chuẩn bị và cảm xúc khi thi

e.p: What do you study and how often?
e.m: Nói chủ đề và tần suất (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'I study + N and + frequency.'
e.s: I study vocabulary and I study every day.

e.p: How do you feel after a test and did you pass?
e.m: Nói cảm xúc và pass/no (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'I am + adj and + yes/no.'
e.s: I am happy and yes, I passed.

e.p: Can you use a dictionary in tests and can you sit with a friend?
e.m: Trả lời hai ý ngắn (can/can't) trong 1 câu.
e.h: Use 'No, you can't and No, you can't.'
e.s: No, you can't use a dictionary and no, you can't sit with a friend.

e.p: What do you bring and when do you arrive for the exam?
e.m: Nói đồ dùng và thời gian đến (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'I bring + N and I arrive + time.'
e.s: I bring a pen and I arrive early.

e.p: Who helps you study and where do you meet?
e.m: Nói người giúp và nơi gặp (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'My friend helps and we meet + place.'
e.s: My friend helps me and we meet after class.

d.t: Ôn tập: Xin giúp và hỏi hạn nộp

e.p: Can you help me and what is the homework?
e.m: Trả lời can/can't và nêu bài (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I can' hoặc 'No, I can't' và 'The homework is + N.'
e.s: Yes, I can help and the homework is exercise two.

e.p: When is the assignment due and can you extend it?
e.m: Nói thời gian nộp và trả lời về hoãn (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'It is due + time and Yes/No, you can/can't.'
e.s: It is due tonight and yes, you can have an extension.

e.p: Who approves extensions and do you need a note?
e.m: Nói người duyệt và có cần giấy không (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'The teacher approves and Yes/No, you need.'
e.s: The teacher approves extensions and yes, you need a note.

e.p: Where do you submit late work and who checks it?
e.m: Nói nơi nộp và người kiểm (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'Submit + place and The teacher checks.'
e.s: Submit late work in class and the teacher checks it.

e.p: Do you get extra practice and how do you receive it?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nêu cách nhận (1 câu).
e.h: Use 'Yes, you get + N and you receive it + place.'
e.s: Yes, you get extra practice and you receive it from the teacher.
